articles.title: Review & setlist: Diana Krall brought a special kind of magic to The Cabot
articles.description:
Krall, with bassist John Clayton, brought all of her prodigious piano and vocal talents to bear in Beverly.

The post Review & setlist: Diana Krall brought a special kind of magic to The Cabot appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Diana Krall performed at The Cabot in Beverly on March 28, 2026.
Krall showcased her talents alongside bassist John Clayton during the concert.
The event attracted local jazz enthusiasts, enhancing the cultural scene in Beverly.
